title: AquaPhobia
description: A terrifying horror mod that adds a deadly salmon-like water creature that hunts players and drowns them.
body:
![Phobia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cccda8224650a343a7eca52ce60c82f39bf7531b.png)


# ABOUT:
 
 AQUAPHOBIA is a Minecraft horror mod that adds a mysterious water creature inspired by a salmon-like humanoid monster.

## Features:

- Spawns near rivers, lakes, and oceans
- Hunts nearby players
- Pulls victims underwater
- Can drown players if they fail to escape
- Creepy sounds and horror atmosphere

Perfect for players who want a scary survival experience.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tI8yr783_Uo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### Warning: Never trust calm water again.
